Metadata.title: Mekuri
Metadata.description: A lightweight local comic and manga reader for macOS. Open CBZ, CBR, and image folders.

Hero.description: Mekuri is a lightweight macOS app for reading local comics and manga. Open CBZ, CBR archives or image folders and enjoy a distraction-free reading experience.

step1.title: Open or Drop
step1.description: Drag & drop a CBZ, CBR file or image folder onto Mekuri. That's it.

step2.title: Read Your Way
step2.description: Single page, spread view, RTL or LTR — customize to match your reading style.

step3.title: Navigate Freely
step3.description: Arrow keys, click, trackpad swipe, or the page slider. Full keyboard control.

formats.title: CBZ, CBR & Folders
formats.description: Open ZIP/CBZ archives, RAR/CBR archives, and image folders. All your local comics in one reader.

spread.title: Spread View
spread.description: Read in single or two-page spread mode. Landscape pages are automatically displayed full-width.

rtl.title: RTL & LTR
rtl.description: Switch between right-to-left and left-to-right reading direction. RTL is default for Japanese manga.

keyboard.title: Keyboard & Trackpad
keyboard.description: Navigate with arrow keys, click zones, or trackpad swipe. Press F for fullscreen.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: All files stay on your Mac. No accounts, no servers, no tracking. Your library is yours alone.

lightweight.title: Lightweight
lightweight.description: Built with Tauri for minimal resource usage. Small download, fast startup, low memory footprint.

CTA.title: Start reading in seconds.
CTA.description: Download Mekuri, drop in your comics, and enjoy. Free and open source.
